Treatment.name: Abhyangam
Treatment.description: Ayurvedic full-body oil massage using customized herbal oils to nourish skin, ease stress, and improve joint flexibility

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Podikizhi
Treatment.description: Full-body oil massage combined with herbal powder poultice therapy for pain relief and inflammation reduction

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Januvasti
Treatment.description: Oil massage with warm medicated oil pooling over the knee joint for knee pain and stiffness

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Kativasthi
Treatment.description: Oil massage with warm medicated oil pooling over the lower back for lumbar pain and sciatica

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Njavarakizhi
Treatment.description: Oil massage followed by Njavara rice bolus application for nourishing muscles and improving skin texture

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Netra Tharpanam
Treatment.description: Oil massage combined with medicated ghee eye bath for eye strain, dryness, and vision support

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Takradhara
Treatment.description: Oil massage followed by continuous pouring of medicated buttermilk on the forehead for stress, insomnia, and skin conditions

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Thalam
Treatment.description: Oil massage with medicated paste application on the crown of the head for headaches and mental tension

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Thalapothichil
Treatment.description: Oil massage with herbal paste head pack for hair health, cooling, and mental relaxation

Treatment.name: Udwarthanam
Treatment.description: Herbal powder massage using upward strokes for weight management, cellulite reduction, and skin toning

Treatment.name: Elakizhi
Treatment.description: Herbal leaf poultice massage for arthritis, joint pain, muscle spasms, and sports injuries

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Lepanam
Treatment.description: Oil massage with therapeutic herbal paste application for skin conditions and localized inflammation

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Nasyam
Treatment.description: Oil massage with nasal administration of medicated oils for sinusitis, migraine, and upper respiratory conditions

Treatment.name: Pizhichil
Treatment.description: Royal oil bath — continuous warm medicated oil poured over the body for paralysis, nerve disorders, and rejuvenation

Treatment.name: Post Natal Massage
Treatment.description: Specialized Ayurvedic massage for postpartum recovery, uterine toning, and lactation support

Treatment.name: Shiroabhyangam
Treatment.description: Ayurvedic head, neck, and shoulder massage for headaches, hair health, and mental relaxation

Treatment.name: Abhyangam & Shirodhara
Treatment.description: Full-body oil massage followed by continuous warm oil stream on the forehead for deep relaxation and neurological conditions

Treatment.name: Shirovasti
Treatment.description: Warm medicated oil retained on the head using a cap for neurological disorders, facial paralysis, and insomnia

ClinicalNote.title: Fever and cough for 3 days
ClinicalNote.content: Patient presents with high-grade fever (102°F) and productive cough for 3 days. Associated with body aches and fatigue. No difficulty breathing. No history of travel.

ClinicalNote.title: Childhood asthma
ClinicalNote.content: History of childhood asthma, resolved at age 8. No hospitalizations. Immunizations up to date.

Communication.subject: Payment Reminder — Outstanding Balance
Communication.message:
Dear Patient,

This is a friendly reminder that you have an outstanding balance of S$56.00 with our clinic.

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience. You can pay at the clinic reception or contact us for alternative arrangements.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Warm regards,
Ayurveda Clinic
